description:
Reassign every <h1>-<h6> in src/ to either .text-title (text-3xl md:text-5xl) or .text-subtitle (text-xl md:text-2xl). Replace ad-hoc heading sizes that currently range from text-2xl (Campus) to text-6xl (PeopleDirectory) for the same semantic level.

Per-site judgment is the bulk of the work — e.g., Campus's 'Meet the Space' likely subtitle (relative to page hero), PeopleDirectory's 'People' is title. Plan file records all assignments.

Spec: .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md.

Why: Same semantic heading level renders at wildly different sizes across pages. Creates inconsistent visual hierarchy. Depends on FRAC-51 foundation.

Acceptance: Every <h1>-<h6> uses .text-title or .text-subtitle (no ad-hoc text-* sizes on headings). Section structure on every page reviewed for title/subtitle correctness. Visual diff per page recorded in plan.
title: Heading size normalization — adopt .text-title and .text-subtitle
